untranslatable_reason: Signal requires a custom 'stationary time series' derived from an unspecified transformation and a fixed threshold set at the 80th percentile of historical range. This is not a standard pre-computed indicator in the allowed list. The closest proxy (bb_pct_b at 0.80 scale) is used as a reasonable approximation of a normalized/stationary series with threshold crossing logic, but this is not equivalent to the original signal specification which requires explicit stationarity transformation and percentile-based threshold calibration.
translation_notes: Original signal specifies a generic threshold-crossing rule on a stationary series. Without knowing the specific stationarity transformation method, bb_pct_b (Bollinger Band percentage B) was selected as it represents a normalized, mean-reverting stationary-like series on 0-1 scale. The 80th percentile threshold maps to 0.80 on the bb_pct_b scale. Crosses above 0.80 trigger long; crosses below trigger short (context-dependent direction preserved). This is an approximation and may not replicate the author's intended behavior without the original transformation specification.
